sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 59

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 59:1
items.html: (to the question) Although for the beginning of its illumination, for the sake of the Katnut of ZA [Zeir Anpin], AA [Arich Anpin] must couple within himself in a Zivug of kisses [Neshikin], as above in Answer 163 — nevertheless, when the NHY [Netzah, Hod, Yesod] of AA impart the discernments of ZON to AVI [Aba ve Ima], he does not give of the discernment of the Gadlut in this Light, but only of the corresponding discernment in which ZA stands, in the manner explained regarding the Rucha Kadma'a [first spirit]. (p. 757, beginning "However")
